title: Number of Ways to Wear Different Hats to Each Other
hints: Since n is small, track which people have hats using a bitmask. Process hats one by one to assign them.
Use dynamic programming where the state is (current hat index, mask of people assigned). Iterate through hats 1 to 40.
For each hat, decide which subset of unassigned people who like it will wear it. Sum the ways to reach the full mask.
